Quarkus_Framework/Quarkus_Iniciante/prim.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.
Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 17 to Java 21.
Quarkus_Framework/Quarkus_Iniciante/prim.why_exists: Code targeting Java 21 features or APIs will fail to compile if the compiler release is set to 17.

Quarkus_Framework/Quarkus_Iniciante/prim.general_idea: Explicitly set the release configuration in the maven-compiler-plugin to 21.
Quarkus_Framework/Quarkus_Iniciante/prim.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 21, overriding or reinforcing the property setting for correct compilation.
